encounter.reason: one-year cognitive monitoring follow-up for Alzheimer's disease
encounter.location: First Coast Neurology Associates, 836 Prudential Drive, Suite 1400, Jacksonville, FL 32207

screening.name: Mini-Mental State Examination (MMSE) total score
screening.interpretation: consistent with mild-stage Alzheimer's disease; stable trajectory compared to 24/30 approximately one year prior

conditions.name: Alzheimer's disease, mild stage
conditions.note: Disease confirmed stable on donepezil therapy. MMSE 23/30, one-point change from 24/30 over approximately one year, consistent with expected stabilization on cholinesterase inhibitor. Patient remains in the mild stage with preserved basic ADLs and partially preserved IADLs.

medications.name: donepezil 10 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: take one 10 mg tablet by mouth once daily

document_references.description: One-year cognitive monitoring follow-up for Alzheimer's disease via telemedicine video visit with Dr. Raymond Patel. Documents MMSE score of 23/30 (stable trajectory), caregiver report of functional status, continuation of donepezil 10 mg daily, and safety counseling regarding driving limitations. Plan includes 6-month follow-up and recommendation for interim MMSE at PCP visits.
